TextView.android:text: Double-tap any vehicle for size info / साइज़ जानने के लिए डबल टैप करें
Max load: 20 Kg\nIdeal for: documents, small parcels\nDimensions: standard bike carrier
Max load: 20 Kg\nIdeal for: letters, food, small items\nDimensions: standard bike carrier
Max load: 500 Kg\nIdeal for: grocery, furniture, boxes\nBed: ~5×4 ft open loader
Max load: 500 Kg\nIdeal for: retail goods, produce\nBed: ~5×4 ft open loader
Max load: 500 Kg\nEco-friendly · lower emissions\nBed: ~5×4 ft open loader
Max load: 1700 Kg\nIdeal for: home shifting, bulk goods\nBed size: 8×5 ft
Max load: 1700 Kg\nIdeal for: office relocation, heavy cargo\nBed size: 10×6 ft
Max load: 1700 Kg\nIdeal for: warehouse, large shifting\nBed size: 12×6 ft (largest option)
